sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected decline in revenue for a key geographic region suggests immediate negative pressure on earnings and growth outlook.

headlines.headline: Holtar Stores names new head of digital payments division

sentiment.reasoning: Appointing a new division head introduces leadership change, which carries inherent uncertainty regarding future strategic direction.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
